'''gavofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qilianshanite|qilianshanite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qilianshanite|qilianshanite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gavofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gævefeth|gævefeth]] || [[word:gævefej|gævefej]] || [[word:gævefesh|gævefesh]] || [[word:gævefe|gævefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gavovofoth|gavovofoth]] || [[word:gavovofoj|gavovofoj]] || [[word:gavovofosh|gavovofosh]] || [[word:gavovofo|gavovofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gavofoth|gavofoth]] || [[word:gavofoj|gavofoj]] || [[word:gavofosh|gavofosh]] || [[word:gavofo|gavofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gavoffoth|gavoffoth]] || [[word:gavoffoj|gavoffoj]] || [[word:gavoffosh|gavoffosh]] || [[word:gavoffof|gavoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gavofotho|gavofotho]] || [[word:gavofojo|gavofojo]] || [[word:gavofosho|gavofosho]] || [[word:gavofoko|gavofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gavofoth|gavofoth]] || [[word:gavofoj|gavofoj]] || [[word:gavofosh|gavofosh]] || [[word:gavofo|gavofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gavofothol|gavofothol]] || [[word:gavofojol|gavofojol]] || [[word:gavofoshol|gavofoshol]] || [[word:gavofokol|gavofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gavofothotho|gavofothotho]] || [[word:gavofojojo|gavofojojo]] || [[word:gavofoshosho|gavofoshosho]] || [[word:gavofoko|gavofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gavofothon|gavofothon]] || [[word:gavofojon|gavofojon]] || [[word:gavofoshon|gavofoshon]] || [[word:gavofokon|gavofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gavofothoro|gavofothoro]] || [[word:gavofojoro|gavofojoro]] || [[word:gavofoshoro|gavofoshoro]] || [[word:gavofokoro|gavofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
